templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $125. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content:
All our products have a two-year warranty from their date of purchase against any manufacturing defect certified by our Quality Department. Please bear in mind that our product warranty does not cover any damage caused by improper use. In addition Pikolinos will not accept complaints concerning products previously handled or repaired by the customer.

Once the incident has been processed by our Customer Experience team, Pikolinos' Quality Department will review the damaged item and our specialists will decide whether to repair or replace it depending on how it is damaged. If we have to give a refund we will need your bank account number.

Remember that it is very important to always keep your receipt or proof of purchase so we can give you the best solution.

templates.name: Price adjustment
templates.content: I'm afraid we are unable to make price adjustments to orders placed prior to the sale. You will have to return for a refund and purchase at the sale price if you'd like.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: Please log in to your account and identify the order you want to return and click on RETURN AN ORDER.

templates.name: How should I care for my shoe?
templates.content: Please go to https://www.pikolinos.com/us-en/store-locator?showMap=true&horizontalView=true&isForm=false to learn more on how to maintain your Pikolinos.

templates.name: How will I know my exchange has been completed?
templates.content: As soon as we receive the item and check it's in perfect condition, we'll proceed with sending you the new size.

templates.name: What happens when I make a purchase?
templates.content: You will receive a confirmation email once your order has been successfully paid. We'll contact you if more information is needed, or if there is an issue with your order.

templates.name: You don't ship to my country
templates.content: Please contact us via phone or email so we can better assist you to confirm if we ship to your address. 1 (877) 745-4872 and PikolinosUSA@pikolinos.com

templates.name: Do you save payment information?
templates.content: Pikolinos online store never has access to any confidential info relating to the payment method. Because of this, every order requires payment details.

templates.name: If this is a gift, will the recipient see any price or receipt?
templates.content: If you request a gift order, the price will not be included. You can also include a special card in your order, with the text of your choice written for the recipient.

templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: Returns of products purchased from Pikolinos.com are free, as long as they take place within 30 calendar days from the date of receipt of the order.

templates.name: When will I receive my new order after processing the exchange?
templates.content: We'll ship your new size as soon as we receive the returned in our warehouse. You'll get an email with all the info about your order once it leaves our facilities so you can track its progress.

templates.name: Do you offer free exchanges?
templates.content: Size exchanges for products purchased on Pikolinos.com are free of charge, provided they're made within 30 calendar days from the date you received the order.

templates.name: What condition do I need to return the order in?
templates.content: To be able to accept an exchange or return, it's imperative that the product to be returned is in perfect condition, that it has not been used or damaged and that it's still in its original box.

templates.name: Do you ship to Canada?
templates.content: We currently do not ship to Canada, but feel free to check out our authorized distributor for some styles available at www.espyexperience.com

templates.name: What is Klarna?
templates.content: Our partner Klarna is a third-party app that offers payment installments.

templates.name: Retroactive discount request
templates.content: Unfortunately, once the order is placed we cannot apply the promo code retroactively. Apologies for the inconvenience.

templates.name: I have wide feet, do you have?
templates.content: We currently do not have styles that come in wide other than a few boots, but please contact us so we can make a recommendation. 1 (877) 745-4872 and PikolinosUSA@pikolinos.com

templates.name: Payment options
templates.content: We have several payment options available including credit or debit card, PayPal, Apple Pay, or Klarna. If you have any issues please contact us. 1 (877) 745-4872 and PikolinosUSA@pikolinos.com

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! I'd recommend taking a look at our size guide to find your best fit https://www.pikolinos.com/us-en/guia-de-tallas.html If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.pikolinos.com/store-locator?showMap=true&horizontalView=true&isForm=false

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/pikolinos_shoes/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/Pikolinos.Shoes/

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1(877)-745-4872 Monday to Friday 9am-5pm or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Can I change my shipping address?
templates.content:
Yes, as long as you see the "Edit" option on your order in My Account > My Orders you can go in and change your shipping or billing address, or both.

If you don't see this option, your order is already being prepared and you can't change it.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.pikolinos.com/us-en/localizar-pedido

templates.name: How will I know that my return has been completed?
templates.content: As soon as we receive the item and check it's in perfect condition, we will refund the full amount to your credit card or whichever other payment method you used. This payment will be made according to the terms and conditions of your bank.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: I’ve made a purchase on a fraudulent website, what should I do?
templates.content: Our apologies for what happened. Please inform your bank and/or credit card provider about what has happened. They will be able to take appropriate action. And please contact us at 1 (877) 745-4872 or PikolinosUSA@pikolinos.com

templates.name: Can I exchange my order from online in a store?
templates.content: Exchanges of online purchases are not accepted at our authorized retailers. Any size exchanges must be made through your account on Pikolinos.com.

templates.name: Why can't I find my size?/You don't have the size I need
templates.content: If you can't find what you're looking for, unfortunately we have no stock left.  You can always request to receive a notification when the product is back in stock. Or Contact us via phone or email for further help. 1 (877) 745-4872 and PikolinosUSA@pikolinos.com

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content:
If you ordered the wrong size or colour, you can cancel your order and place a new one with the right products unless we have already started preparing your shipment. Go to My Account > My Orders and click on your order to cancel it.

For incorrect address entered, if you see the "Edit" option on your order in My Account > My Orders you can change your shipping or billing address, or both. 

If you don't see this option, your order is already being prepared and I'm afraid you can't cancel or edit it. You'll have to wait to receive the delivery and return it.

templates.name: Can I return my online order to a store?
templates.content: Returns of online purchases are not accepted at our authorized retailers. Any returns must be made through your account on Pikolinos.com.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 24-48 business hours and we usually ship via UPS. Once shipped it will take 3-7 business days domestically. We also offer express shipping which will take 2 to 3 business days, for $25.95.

templates.name: I have narrow feet, do you have?
templates.content: We currently do not have styles that come in narrow, but please contact us so we can make a recommendation. 1 (877) 745-4872 and PikolinosUSA@pikolinos.com

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at pikolinosusa@pikolinos.com or give us a call at 1(877)-745-4872 during our working hours. You can also live chat with one of our representatives online. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content:
We hope you're happy with the purchases you made on Pikolinos.com, if you need to make an exchange, you have a period of 30 calendar days from the date when you received the order to do so. For our customers that igned up to be part of our Smiling Community we offer 60 days from the day of the delivery.

On Pikolinos.com we only accept size exchanges. Go to My Account, select the product you want to exchange in the My Orders section and follow the instructions to exchange your Pikolinos for a different size.

If you need to exchange the design model or the color or one-size products, you should process a return and make a new purchase of the product you want.

There is no charge for returns but if your order included shipping charges, they will not be refunded.

If your exchange is due to a quality issue, please contact pikolinosusa@pikolinos.com and we'll help you.
